lines.gurmukhi: ਦਹ ਦਿਸਿ ਸਾਖ ਹਰੀ ਹਰੀਆਵਲ ਸਹਜਿ ਪਕੈ ਸੋ ਮੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: deh dis saakh haree hareeaaval sehaj pakai so meetthaa |
lines.english: In all ten directions, the branches are green and alive. That which ripens slowly, is sweet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗੈ ਘਾਮ ਪਿਛੈ ਰੁਤਿ ਜਾਡਾ ਦੇਖਿ ਚਲਤ ਮਨੁ ਡੋਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: aagai ghaam pichhai rut jaaddaa dekh chalat man ddole |
lines.english: Summer is now behind us, and the winter season is ahead. Gazing upon this play, my shaky mind wavers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਤਕਿ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਪਇਆ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: katak kirat peaa jo prabh bhaaeaa |
lines.english: In Katak, that alone comes to pass, which is pleasing to the Will of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਸੁਨਿ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਏ ਬਸੀਠਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak asun milahu piaare satigur bhe baseetthaa |11|
lines.english: O Nanak, in Assu, please meet me, my Beloved. The True Guru has become my Advocate and Friend. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਪਕੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਬਲੈ ਤਤਿ ਜਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: deepak sehaj balai tat jalaaeaa |
lines.english: The lamp of intuition burns, lit by the essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਪਕ ਰਸ ਤੇਲੋ ਧਨ ਪਿਰ ਮੇਲੋ ਧਨ ਓਮਾਹੈ ਸਰਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: deepak ras telo dhan pir melo dhan omaahai sarasee |
lines.english: Love is the oil in the lamp, which unites the soul-bride with her Lord. The bride is delighted, in ecstasy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਣ ਮਾਰੀ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਸੀਝੈ ਗੁਣਿ ਮਾਰੀ ਤਾ ਮਰਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: avagan maaree marai na seejhai gun maaree taa marasee |
lines.english: One who dies in faults and demerits - her death is not successful. But one who dies in glorious virtue, really truly dies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਦੇ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਬੈਠੇ ਅਜਹੁ ਤਿਨਾੜੀ ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: naam bhagat de nij ghar baitthe ajahu tinaarree aasaa |
lines.english: Those who are blessed with devotional worship of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, sit in the home of their own inner being. They place their hopes in You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਕਪਟ ਦਰ ਖੋਲਹੁ ਏਕ ਘੜੀ ਖਟੁ ਮਾਸਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak milahu kapatt dar kholahu ek gharree khatt maasaa |12|
lines.english: Nanak: please open the shutters of Your Door, O Lord, and meet me. A single moment is like six months to me. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਘਰ ਮਾਹੁ ਭਲਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਮਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: manghar maahu bhalaa har gun ank samaave |
lines.english: The month of Maghar is good, for those who sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and merge in His Being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਚਤੁਰੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ਚੰਚਲੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: nihachal chatur sujaan bidhaataa chanchal jagat sabaaeaa |
lines.english: The Primal Lord is Unmoving and Unchanging, Clever and Wise; all the world is fickle.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਵੰਤੀ ਗੁਣ ਰਵੈ ਮੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਭਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: gunavantee gun ravai mai pir nihachal bhaave |
lines.english: The virtuous wife utters His Glorious Praises; my Beloved Husband Lord is Eternal and Unchanging.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੀਤ ਨਾਦ ਕਵਿਤ ਕਵੇ ਸੁਣਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਭਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: geet naad kavit kave sun raam naam dukh bhaagai |
lines.english: I have heard the songs and the music, and the poems of the poets; but only the Name of the Lord takes away my pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਮਾਣੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਣੇ ਤਾ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: giaan dhiaan gun ank samaane prabh bhaane taa bhaaeaa |
lines.english: By virtue of spiritual wisdom and meditation, she merges in His Being; she is pleasing to God, and He is pleasing to her.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੋਖਿ ਤੁਖਾਰੁ ਪੜੈ ਵਣੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਣੁ ਰਸੁ ਸੋਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: pokh tukhaar parrai van trin ras sokhai |
lines.english: In Poh, the snow falls, and the sap of the trees and the fields dries up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾ ਧਨ ਨਾਹ ਪਿਆਰੀ ਅਭ ਭਗਤੀ ਪਿਰ ਆਗੈ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naanak saa dhan naah piaaree abh bhagatee pir aagai |13|
lines.english: O Nanak, that soul-bride is pleasing to her Husband Lord, who performs loving devotional worship before her Beloved. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਤ ਕੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਵਸਹਿ ਮੁਖੇ ॥
lines.translit: aavat kee naahee man tan vaseh mukhe |
lines.english: Why have You not come? I keep You in my mind, body and mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: man tan rav rahiaa jagajeevan gurasabadee rang maanee |
lines.english: He is permeating and pervading my mind and body; He is the Life of the World. Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I enjoy His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਡਜ ਜੇਰਜ ਸੇਤਜ ਉਤਭੁਜ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: anddaj jeraj setaj utabhuj ghatt ghatt jot samaanee |
lines.english: His Light fills all those born of eggs, born from the womb, born of sweat and born of the earth, each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਹੁ ਦਇਆਪਤਿ ਦਾਤੇ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਵਉ ਮਤਿ ਦੇਹੋ ॥
lines.translit: darasan dehu deaapat daate gat paavau mat deho |
lines.english: Grant me the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, O Lord of Mercy and Compassion. O Great Giver, grant me understanding, that I might find salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਵੈ ਰਸਿ ਰਸੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸਨੇਹੋ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak rang ravai ras raseea har siau preet saneho |14|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord enjoys, savors and ravishes the bride who is in love with Him. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਘਿ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਭਈ ਤੀਰਥੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: maagh puneet bhee teerath antar jaaniaa |
lines.english: In Maagh, I become pure; I know that the sacred shrine of pilgrimage is within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਗੁਣ ਅੰਕੇ ਸੁਣਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬੰਕੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਾ ਸਰਿ ਨਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: preetam gun anke sun prabh banke tudh bhaavaa sar naavaa |
lines.english: O my Beloved, Beauteous Lord God, please listen: I sing Your Glories, and merge in Your Being. If it is pleasing to Your Will, I bathe in the sacred pool within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਹਿ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਮਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: saajan sehaj mile gun geh ank samaaniaa |
lines.english: I have met my Friend with intuitive ease; I grasp His Glorious Virtues, and merge in His Being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁੰਨ ਦਾਨ ਪੂਜਾ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: pun daan poojaa paramesur jug jug eko jaataa |
lines.english: Charity, donations, adoration and worship all rest in the Transcendent Lord God; throughout the ages, I realize the One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੰਗ ਜਮੁਨ ਤਹ ਬੇਣੀ ਸੰਗਮ ਸਾਤ ਸਮੁੰਦ ਸਮਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: gang jamun teh benee sangam saat samund samaavaa |
lines.english: The Ganges, Jamunaa, the sacred meeting place of the three rivers, the seven seas,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਾਘਿ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਨਾਤਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak maagh mahaa ras har jap atthasatth teerath naataa |15|
lines.english: O Nanak, in Maagh, the most sublime essence is meditation on the Lord; this is the cleansing bath of the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਲਗੁਨਿ ਮਨਿ ਰਹਸੀ ਪ੍ਰੇਮੁ ਸੁਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: falagun man rahasee prem subhaaeaa |
lines.english: In Phalgun, her mind is enraptured, pleased by the Love of her Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਹਸੁ ਭਇਆ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: anadin rehas bheaa aap gavaaeaa |
lines.english: Night and day, she is enraptured, and her selfishness is gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੋਹੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ਜਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਘਰਿ ਆਓ ॥
lines.translit: man mohu chukaaeaa jaa tis bhaaeaa kar kirapaa ghar aao |
lines.english: Emotional attachment is eradicated from her mind, when it pleases Him; in His Mercy, He comes to my home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਤੇ ਵੇਸ ਕਰੀ ਪਿਰ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਮਹਲੀ ਲਹਾ ਨ ਥਾਓ ॥
lines.translit: bahute ves karee pir baajhahu mahalee lahaa na thaao |
lines.english: I dress in various clothes, but without my Beloved, I shall not find a place in the Mansion of His Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਰ ਡੋਰ ਰਸ ਪਾਟ ਪਟੰਬਰ ਪਿਰਿ ਲੋੜੀ ਸੀਗਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: haar ddor ras paatt pattanbar pir lorree seegaaree |
lines.english: I have adorned myself with garlands of flowers, pearl necklaces, scented oils and silk robes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇ ਦਸ ਮਾਹ ਰੁਤੀ ਥਿਤੀ ਵਾਰ ਭਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: be das maah rutee thitee vaar bhale |
lines.english: The twelve months, the seasons, the weeks, the days, the hours, the minutes and the seconds are all sublime,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੇਲਿ ਲਈ ਗੁਰਿ ਅਪਣੈ ਘਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਰੀ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: naanak mel lee gur apanai ghar var paaeaa naaree |16|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Guru has united me with Him. The soul-bride has found her Husband Lord, within the home of her own heart. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਿਲੇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਕਾਰਜ ਸਾਰੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh mile piaare kaaraj saare karataa sabh bidh jaanai |
lines.english: God, my Beloved, has met me, and my affairs are all resolved. The Creator Lord knows all ways and means.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੜੀ ਮੂਰਤ ਪਲ ਸਾਚੇ ਆਏ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gharree moorat pal saache aae sehaj mile |
lines.english: When the True Lord comes and meets her with natural ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੀ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੀ ਮੇਲੁ ਭਇਆ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: jin seegaaree tiseh piaaree mel bheaa rang maanai |
lines.english: I am loved by the One who has embellished and exalted me; I have met Him, and I savor His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਸੇਜ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਜਾ ਪਿਰਿ ਰਾਵੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: ghar sej suhaavee jaa pir raavee guramukh masatak bhaago |
lines.english: The bed of my heart becomes beautiful, when my Husband Lord ravishes me. As Gurmukh, the destiny on my forehead has been awakened and activated.
